op.schema: loading standard candidates for the design

schema.head: Standard ontology candidates
schema.hint: For the terms this design newly mints, here are matching terms from famous standards (suggestions only — adopt them in the catalog after ingest).

picker.placeholder: Search a standard term (e.g. crystal structure)
picker.none: No matching standard term. Try different words.

adopt.head: Ground to an external standard
adopt.hint: Map this dataset's own terms to a real term in a famous standard ontology (candidates come from a closed set; a human confirms).
adopt.noTerms: No own terms to ground yet (they appear once the vocabulary is settled after ingest).
